title: Election 2026 LIVE: Record Phase 1 turnout; focus shifts to Bengal, TN as Amit Shah vows to end TMC ‘reign of terror’
description: Election 2026 LIVE: The first phase of the 2026 Assembly election cycle has concluded, with voting completed in Kerala, Puducherry and Assam. According to the ECI, Assam recorded a voter turnout of 85.38 per cent, surpassing its previous high, while Puducherry also set a record with 89.83 per cent.
